faqs.answer: A pest emergency includes situations like large rodent infestations, bee or wasp nests in high-traffic areas, bed bug discoveries, active termite swarms, or any infestation posing immediate health or safety risks. If pests are threatening your property or wellbeing, we respond immediately with 24/7 emergency service throughout New Springville.
